decisions.what: Created styles.css with full theming (CSS custom properties), gradient background, hero flex layout, form/button styling, animated messages, tablet/desktop breakpoints, reduced-motion support, and utility classes
decisions.why: Spec required a comprehensive CSS system with CSS custom properties, gradient design, responsive layout, and accessibility features

decisions.what: Added <link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css"> inside <head> after existing meta/favicon links and before </head>
decisions.why: Spec required linking the new stylesheet with a relative path in the same directory, placed after meta tags and before closing head

decisions.what: Included .visually-hidden alongside .sr-only in the utilities block
decisions.why: index.html uses the class name 'visually-hidden' on hidden helper text, and the spec asks for screen-reader-only styling; supporting both class names avoids leaking hidden content into the visible layout
